title: Global Relay Voice Record
description: A voice or video call recording archived in the Global Relay Archive, including call metadata, participants, and references to audio/video files.

callId.description: Unique identifier for the call or meeting

title.description: Title or subject of the call or meeting

startTime.description: Start time of the call in ISO 8601 format

endTime.description: End time of the call in ISO 8601 format

fileIds.description: IDs of audio/video files uploaded via /files endpoint

transcript.description: Text transcript of the call if available
